name: Bruin 24x24 Garage Shed Plan - A Craftsman-Style Garage with Stone Accents & Classic Gable Roof
open_features: High-pitch roofline offers traditional charm, excellent snow shedding, and plenty of interior wall height for shelving, tools, and storage.
Straightforward framing, simple roof geometry, and clean building lines make this an ideal project for both first-time builders and experienced contractors.
Two modern overhead garage doors provide wide, easy entry for cars, trucks, ATVs, lawn equipment, or workshop materials.
Warm brown lap siding paired with textured stone base details creates a rich, earthy aesthetic inspired by lodge and Craftsman-style architecture.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Bruin Garage Shed Plan - a 24x24 premium garage and workshop solution designed with timeless Craftsman character, strong architectural detailing, and efficient, builder-friendly construction. Featuring a classic gable roof, rich wood siding, and beautiful stone wainscoting, the Bruin delivers unmatched curb appeal paired with practical everyday functionality. Whether you're constructing a two-vehicle garage, a full woodworking shop, a storage hub...
